hero.subline: Summit Realty Group — Westchester County, NY's trusted real estate brokerage.
hero.headline: Team

items.name: Emily Carter
items.quote: Summit Realty Group gave us a clear strategy, communicated constantly, and helped us close above asking without surprises.

items.name: David Nguyen
items.quote: In a competitive market, Summit Realty Group helped us win the right home with the right terms and zero pressure.

items.name: Priya Shah
items.quote: Their local guidance on neighborhoods and schools saved us months of trial and error.
